decision: Spine Phase 3 — Proving vertebrae (deploy, verification, workflow completion events)

steps.notes: Spine Phase 3 shipped: 6 event types (deploy_start, deploy_complete, health_check, verification_complete, workflow_complete, deploy_phase). Instrumented app-state.sh (deploy/restart/rollback), workflow.sh (completion), board-ts (card done). All verified in Loki. Event schema brief sent to Wren.

steps.action: Wire buildSentence renderers for Phase 3 events
steps.notes: Phase 3 renderers wired: deploy_start, deploy_complete, health_check, verification_complete, workflow_complete. Added 7 new parseSpineEntries fields (action, trigger, endpoint, response_ms, method, step_count, total_duration_seconds). Compiled, restarted, live.
